prompt_template.system: You are assessing loan credit risk from a Lending Club benchmark record. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key, "label", whose value is either "good" or "bad".

components.name: label_valid_reward
components.description: Reward exactly one accepted label key with an allowed value.

components.name: exact_match_reward
components.description: Reward exact match against the benchmark label.

components.name: malformed_output_penalty
components.description: Diagnostic-only malformed output flag; not part of the weighted total reward.

notes: This shared reward helper is intentionally simple because CALM-family benchmark wrappers are binary closed-label classification tasks.
Minority-resampling belongs to the original CALM training recipe and is not encoded in the reward function or public benchmark splits.

publication.reason: Published public benchmark-wrapper module over Salesforce/FinEval with source-chain confidence metadata.
